inputs.label: Material Cost per Part
inputs.businessContext: Direct material cost per CNC part. Based on standard cost accounting (ISO 9001).

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage including overhead. Industry benchmark from APICS.

inputs.label: Cycle Time per Part
inputs.businessContext: Time to machine one part. Lean manufacturing standard (Maynard).

inputs.label: Setup Time per Batch
inputs.businessContext: Time to change tooling and fixtures. SMED methodology.

inputs.label: Batch Size
inputs.businessContext: Number of parts per production run. Economic order quantity (EOQ) concept.

inputs.label: Defect Rate
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of defective parts. Six Sigma quality metric (DPMO).

inputs.label: Overhead Rate
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of direct costs for overhead. Standard cost accounting (ISO 9001).

inputs.label: Profit Margin Target
inputs.businessContext: Desired profit margin. Financial planning standard.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data accuracy. Risk assessment factor.

inputs.label: Machine Utilization
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of time machine is productive. OEE metric (ISO 22400).

thresholds.defectRate > 0.05: Critical: Defect rate exceeds 5% - review process capability.
thresholds.machineUtilization < 0.6: Warning: Machine utilization below 60% - consider reducing capacity or increasing throughput.
thresholds.profitMarginTarget < 0.1: Warning: Profit margin target below 10% - may not cover risks.

suggestedActions: If defectRate > 0.05: Implement SPC and root cause analysis.
If machineUtilization < 0.6: Improve scheduling or reduce machine count.
If profitMarginTarget < 0.1: Increase price or reduce costs.
